ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user who posted the review */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (customer, admin, moderator, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the product belongs */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "images" TEXT /* URLs of product images (separated by commas) */,
  "avg_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product based on reviews */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted the review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review written by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Detailed feedback provided by the user */,
  "star_rating" TEXT /* Star rating given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  "posted_time" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating when the review was posted */,
  "description_score" REAL /* Score representing the quality of the review description */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis result of the review content (e.g., Positive, Negative) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (published, pending, rejected, etc.) */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  "report_count" INTEGER /* Number of reports against the review */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer (for anonymous reviews) */,
  "reviewer_email" TEXT /* Email of the reviewer (for anonymous reviews) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review from which the keyword is extracted */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* The keyword itself for analysis */,
  "keyword_category" TEXT /* Category of the keyword (e.g., feature, issue, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Numerical score indicating the sentiment of the review */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Label representing the sentiment (e.g., Positive, Negative) */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment analysis performed (e.g., machine learning, rule-based, etc.) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review being voted on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user casting the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (helpful or not helpful) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_votes_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user filing the report */,
  "report_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was filed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_reports_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)
